title: Smooth Stone Variants
description: This mod adds Smooth Stone Stairs and Walls.
body:
# Smooth Stone Variants   ![Smooth Stone Stairs Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3086b886f23d0c91ee9b46e2172e2f6e13f0fb93.png)
### for Minecraft 26.1.2 (Fabric)

**Requires Fabric API**

This mod adds the missing Smooth Stone Stairs and Smooth Stone Walls. They can be crafted like any other normal block variant in the crafting table or using the stone cutter.


Feel free to make more suggestions and to help with the localization of the mod as currently only English and German are supported.
In the future double slab smooth stone variants might be added.

![Stone Cutter crafting a Smooth Stone Stair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/553fa93c80f97dd0f548aa9df5dabd5eee88ba88.png)

![A crafting table crafting smooth stone walls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6cfa17014ac1356bec4bc558f89eee5ad34b923.png)
